data.body: Investigated: ci-baseline is written but NEVER read back by validate.sh — it is a red herring. The real mechanism is check_ci()'s 'pending + prev_failure → immediate FAIL' logic which uses live GitHub data, not cached state. This is conservative-correct behavior: when the last completed run failed and a new run is still pending, reporting FAIL is appropriate. The ci-baseline file IS read by ci-status.sh's check_regression() for --wait flows, but that's separate from validate.sh's FAIL/PASS outcome. No code fix needed.
